rebuttals.justification: Absence of LR-PLE arm leaves mechanism ambiguous (general linearization vs MLP-specific). Empirically resolvable by adding one LR-PLE fit. Primary directional conclusion (PLE-MLP > raw-MLP) survives regardless; only mechanism attribution changes. DEFER over CONCEDE.

Capacity confound explicitly acknowledged in PoC docstring and README, deliberately left in as a debate seed with Step 6 parameter-matched arm committed. PoC's stated purpose is a directional read, not a confound-free causal estimate. Staged-investigation design intent.

Convergence unverified (n_iter_ not reported). Partial mitigation from early_stopping=True, but cannot confirm raw-MLP wasn't iteration-limited. Resolvable by reporting n_iter_ and rerunning with max_iter=1000. Magnitude of impact genuinely unknown.

'Near-linear in PLE space' mechanism asserted but not measured. Theoretical coverage argument (~12 bins/period) is plausible but not a measurement. Resolvable by R^2 of linear model on PLE features vs latent logit. Directional read survives even if linearization is weak.
Noise-feature asymmetry is MINOR and of critic-acknowledged ambiguous direction. Second-order to the 4 informative features driving the +0.029 gap. Eligible for REBUT-IMMATERIAL.

verdict_rationale: Three DEFERs (F1, F3, F4) at adj_sev 5-6 route to empirical tests; F2 rebutted on design intent to adj_sev 2; F5 immaterial. No CONCEDE. Residual DEFERs above threshold => empirical_test_agreed, not defense_wins.
